# Ambassador service port matrix

This document catalogs the network port matrix for the ambassador service
fleet. The table below is large enough to be a maintenance liability and
is intended to trip the §13 Table Burden threshold.

This table contains 40 rows × 21 columns = 840 cells and should trip the
§13 Table Burden hard-warning threshold. The surrounding prose is
intentionally thin so the burden score is not offset by a strong scaffold.
